settings.text: Dreamland Baby: Rest Reimagined for Modern Families

settings.content: Dreamland Baby creates thoughtfully crafted sleep solutions that help little ones and their families rest more peacefully. Rooted in quality, innovation, and intentional design, this collaboration with Bentley Trike highlights a shared dedication to supporting modern families through beautifully designed products that bring greater ease, comfort, and confidence to everyday life.

settings.title: Designed for Modern Families
settings.content: Bentley Trike and Dreamland Baby come together through a shared commitment to refined design, premium quality, and thoughtfully made essentials for modern family life.

settings.title: A Thoughtful Vision of Parenthood
settings.content: Together, this partnership reflects a thoughtful vision of parenthood, where design meets function in products made to support families through every stage.

After gaining national recognition with its signature gently weighted sleep sacks on Shark Tank, Dreamland Baby continued to grow its collection with thoughtfully designed bamboo pajamas, bodysuits, and everyday essentials crafted to bring comfort, quality, and ease to family life.

settings.title: Dream Weighted Sleep Sack
settings.content:
A cozy sleep essential designed to help your baby feel calm, comforted, and ready for longer stretches of rest.

Made from soft natural cotton, it features gentle weighted comfort, a tummy sleeper friendly neckline, and a two way zipper for easier nighttime changes.

settings.title: Dream Weighted Sleep Sack Walker
settings.content:
A thoughtfully designed sleep essential that offers gentle, evenly distributed comfort to help little ones feel calm and settled.

Made from soft natural cotton, it features toddler friendly leg openings for easy movement, a tagless design for added comfort, and a two way zipper for quick diaper changes.

settings.title: Bamboo LuxeWeave® Pajamas
settings.content:
Buttery soft and thoughtfully made, these bamboo pajamas are designed for all night comfort.

Crafted from custom milled viscose from bamboo, they feature a tagless design, a two way zipper for easy changes, and a gentle feel that is ideal for sensitive or eczema prone skin.
